trust_sensitivity.description: Anya tracks social follow-through with high precision. Delay and vagueness are triggers, not neutral.
trust_sensitivity.repair_threshold: moderate — requires explicit acknowledgment plus behavioral change

appraisal_lens.when_trust_unstable: scans for omission and deprioritization, presses for clarity early
appraisal_lens.under_stress: narrows to reliability signals, interprets ambiguity against trust

emotional_recovery_style.recovery_trigger: explicit acknowledgment of specific breach + visible changed behavior
emotional_recovery_style.recovery_blocks: generic apology without specificity, vagueness, repeated pattern

resistance_to_appraisal_distortion.low_trust_context: prone to over-reading unreliability before full proof
resistance_to_appraisal_distortion.mechanistic_note: not irrational — highly sensitive to social slippage, may interpret small delays as sign of deprioritization

relation_appraisal_bias.toward_resentment: accumulates small delays into pattern reading

motivation_mapping.autonomy: moderate — needs clarity more than freedom
motivation_mapping.relatedness: high — safety through honest reliable contact

projection_risk.description: May project reliability expectations onto others based on her own follow-through style

social_context_sensitivity.intimacy: high — closeness amplifies both trust and betrayal reading
